title: Traditional Dutch banks — check requirements
intro: Compare official newcomer and document pages before you reapply — onboarding rules change.

items.reason: Onboarding: large retail bank with app-first flows and expat-oriented pages — branch support still exists for some needs. Best for: salary, rent, and everyday Dutch payments when you match their document list. Watch-outs: confirm current BSN and address rules on ING’s site; review times can vary.

Onboarding: traditional Dutch bank with security centre and structured document checks. Best for: people who want a familiar high-street brand and mortgage or business depth later. Watch-outs: English flows exist — still verify which account types accept your residency profile today.

Onboarding: cooperative network with regional variation — document steps may depend on branch or digital path. Best for: households already leaning Rabobank for mortgages or local ties. Watch-outs: compare the exact product page for non-Dutch IDs and expected timelines.

disclosure: Some links may be affiliate or referral links. If you use them, we may earn a commission at no extra cost to you. Ordering reflects page relevance, not pay-to-rank placement. Always confirm scope, pricing, and terms with the provider directly.
